apis.name: componentSnapshot.get
apis.purpose: Get snapshot of a mounted component by its id (async, callback)

apis.name: componentSnapshot.get (Promise)
apis.purpose: Get snapshot of a mounted component by its id (async, Promise)

apis.name: componentSnapshot.getSync
apis.purpose: Get snapshot of a mounted component synchronously by id

apis.purpose: Render a CustomBuilder offscreen and snapshot it (callback)

apis.name: componentSnapshot.createFromBuilder (Promise)
apis.purpose: Render a CustomBuilder offscreen and snapshot it (Promise)

apis.name: ComponentSnapshot.get (UIContext, callback)
apis.purpose: Get snapshot of a mounted component via UIContext (async, callback)

apis.purpose: Get snapshot of a mounted component via UIContext (async, Promise)

apis.purpose: Get snapshot of a mounted component synchronously via UIContext

apis.purpose: Offscreen builder snapshot via UIContext (callback)

apis.purpose: Offscreen builder snapshot via UIContext (Promise)

apis.purpose: Query max width/height limit for component snapshots

apis.name: SnapshotOptions
apis.purpose: Options for snapshot: scale, waitUntilRenderFinished, region, colorMode, dynamicRangeMode

apis.name: SnapshotSizeLimitation
apis.purpose: Max width and height constraints for component snapshots

apis.name: ColorModeOptions
apis.purpose: Color space configuration for snapshot (SRGB/DISPLAY_P3/DISPLAY_BT2020_SRGB)

apis.name: DynamicRangeModeOptions
apis.purpose: Dynamic range mode configuration for snapshot (STANDARD/HIGH/CONSTRAINT)

apis.name: SnapshotRegionType
apis.purpose: Union type for snapshot region: SnapshotRegion or LocalizedSnapshotRegion

apis.name: SnapshotRegion
apis.purpose: Rectangular region for partial snapshot (left/top/right/bottom)

notableFindings: `componentSnapshot.get()` and `createFromBuilder()` (top-level) are deprecated since API 18; use UIContext.getComponentSnapshot() instance methods instead (API 12+).
`getSync` blocks the main thread with a 3-second timeout; use async `get` for non-blocking snapshots.
Offscreen snapshots (createFromBuilder) do not support animation properties and have ~500ms inherent delay.
XComponent/Video/camera stream components should use `createPixelMapFromSurface` instead of componentSnapshot.
Snapshot captures only the component's own area — overlapping siblings and out-of-area drawing are not included.
`LocalizedSnapshotRegion` adapts to RTL layouts by flipping the region horizontally.
`SnapshotSizeLimitation` is available from API version 26.0.0 only.
